display.purpose: Hero H1 only, one instance on the page.

headline.purpose: Every section's h2; standardized to one size except CtaFinal's deliberate climax exception.

title.purpose: Sub-headings inside a section: product names, trust-bar item titles.

body.purpose: All paragraph copy, light weight, capped under ~75ch measure.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, badges, nav links, footer meta. Wide tracking (0.30em), never below ~11px.

shadows.name: glow-gold
shadows.purpose: State-only glow: ambient CTA pulse, scroll-into-view emphasis flash, carousel dot countdown ring. Never a resting-state property.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: The dominant easing curve across the whole system: reveals, hovers, carousel transitions. No bounce or elastic anywhere.

motion.name: duration-tactile
motion.purpose: Press/hover feedback (SendMorphIcon phase change, button scale).

motion.name: duration-emphasis
motion.purpose: Hero fade-up, CTA emphasis pulse, section collage reveal.

components.name: Primary Button (WhatsApp CTA)
components.description: The one conversion action on the page. Filled WhatsApp green, black text, icon morphs message→send→check on click.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #25d366; color: #000000; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9rem; letter-spacing: 0.02em; padding: 16px 32px; border-radius: 2px; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background-color 0.3s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1ebe57; transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #9A7B50; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-icon { flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Secondary Button (Product CTA)
components.description: Ink-filled CTA used for product-specific asks (e.g. "Garantir meu Malbec"), turns WhatsApp green on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #111111; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: 2px; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 0.3s, color 0.3s, transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #25d366; color: #000000; transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.96); }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Dark carousel card: near-black fill, hairline border only (no shadow), border shifts toward gold on hover.
components.html:
Frescor Aconchegante

Floratta Blue Cologne

Floral musk leve e aconchegante que transmite paz e sofisticação.
components.css: .ds-card-product { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; color: #ffffff; transition: border-color 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background-color 0.5s; } .ds-card-product:hover { border-color: rgba(154,123,80,0.6); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7); } .ds-card-tag { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #B89A6A; border: 1px solid rgba(184,154,106,0.3); background: rgba(154,123,80,0.1); padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 24px 0 0; font-size: 1.375rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-card-desc { margin: 16px 0 0; font-weight: 300; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); }

components.name: Floating Badge
components.description: White pill badge layered over hero/product imagery, gentle float animation, e.g. "Best Seller", "Entrega VIP".
components.css: .ds-badge-floating { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #0a0a0a; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(154,123,80,0.5); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); animation: ds-float 5s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-float { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-4px); } }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Tracked-out uppercase label used for nav links, eyebrows, and footer meta. Wide letter-spacing is a deliberate, consistent voice.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.24em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #B89A6A; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #9A7B50; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Maison Fragrance sells genuine Grupo Boticário and Eudora products through WhatsApp with 1-hour VIP delivery in Belo Horizonte. The system's entire job is to feel like a trusted person you'd text, not a storefront you'd browse: warm serif headlines paired with a quiet, restrained sans body, a single gold accent used sparingly, and motion that acknowledges every action without ever performing for its own sake. The page explicitly rejects the two failure modes on either side of it: the 'digital shelf' of a marketplace app, and the borrowed-prestige theater of aspirational European parfumerie. It is a real, local business, and the design says so plainly.
keyCharacteristics: Editorial serif display type paired with a quiet humanist sans body — contrast carries the premium register, not saturation or ornament.
One accent color (aged gold) at low surface coverage; WhatsApp green is the only other saturated color, reserved exclusively for the conversion action.
Flat, near-sharp geometry (2px corners default) with glow reserved for momentary state, never ambient decoration.
Every WhatsApp CTA is a locally-scoped, specific ask, never a generic 'Buy now'.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Gold is the only decorative color in the system. It never appears as a background fill beyond a thin badge or hairline rule.

rules.name: The Green-Means-Go Rule
rules.body: WhatsApp green is reserved exclusively for the primary conversion action. No other element uses this color.

rules.name: The Two-Serif Rule
rules.body: Cormorant Garamond is reserved for the Hero H1 alone; every other heading uses Playfair Display.

rules.name: The 75ch Ceiling
rules.body: No body paragraph exceeds a ~75-character measure, even inside wide section containers.

rules.name: The One-Signal Rule
rules.body: A surface gets a border OR a glow to signal state change, never both at once.

rules.name: The Earned-Glow Rule
rules.body: Glow effects only fire in direct response to a real state change — never as a static ambient effect on a resting element.

dos: Do keep gold to a hairline, a badge, or typography — never a surface fill.
Do reserve WhatsApp green exclusively for the primary conversion action.
Do use Cormorant Garamond only for the Hero H1; every other heading is Playfair Display.
Do give every interactive element one clear state signal — border-shift OR glow, never both.
Do write every WhatsApp CTA message specific to what the visitor just read, never a generic 'Buy now'.
Do apply the same tactile press feedback to every clickable CTA, filled or text-link.
donts: Don't pair a 1px border with a wide, soft box-shadow on the same element — the 'ghost card' pattern was identified and removed from the product carousel this session.
Don't add a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section as a reflex.
Don't let --luxe-gold sit at default opacity on small text against the light background — it fails WCAG AA at label sizes; use --luxe-gold-deep instead.
Don't ship a dense marketplace grid, discount badges, or promotional noise.
Don't reach for aspirational, borrowed-European-luxury language or imagery.
Don't bolt 'inteligente' onto every noun as a reflexive modifier — 'Luxo Inteligente' is the one deliberate, FAQ-defined brand phrase.
